name: Set up Flat Rate Shipping
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up flat rate shipping using the shipping wizard:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Set my own pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. The "}, {"text": "Create Shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " page updates with a range of new options."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Flat-rate", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click either the "}, {"text": "Use preset carrier", "bold": true}, {"text": " locations or "}, {"text": "Select countries", "bold": true}, {"text": " link to select the location you want the flat rate shipping to be applied to."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Preset carrier locations"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Use preset carrier locations", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the radio button next to the carrier whose locations you want to use."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the checkbox next to each carrier location you wish to ship to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Next step ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Select countries"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Select countries ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the checkbox next to each country you wish to ship to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Next step ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Enter fixed postage prices", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Flat-rate price", "bold": true}, {"text": " for each selected location."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Next step ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Enter name and visibility options"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the relevant "}, {"text": "Visibility", "bold": true}, {"text": " radio button (either "}, {"text": "Show to customers and staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show to staff only", "bold": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Adjust the "}, {"text": "Available to PO box addresses", "bold": true}, {"text": " toggle to allow for shipping to PO Boxes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the shipping option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " of the shipping option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Next step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Review your shipping options"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Validate all previous entries."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To change any entries, click the "}, {"text": "Previous step ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Complete ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have successfully added a flat-rate shipping option. The shipping option will display in the "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": " page. To add another, click the "}, {"text": "Add new shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If some products need to be excluded from the flat-rate option you will need to configure your shipping categories for these items. See "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1628-add-a-shipping-category", "children": [{"text": "Create a shipping category "}]}, {"text": " for further information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
